raw_comment:
What do you notice? 
I notice that the number of players who are colored is less in MLP than the rest of the associations.

What do you wonder? 
I wonder why the number of head coaches who are colored for the NFL are so low compared to other associations.

What impact does this have on you and your community?
The impact that this has on me and my community is that it doesn’t diversify the team as a whole which might not encourage players to try out for the sport. 

What’s going on in this graph? Write a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.
This graph shows us the diversity of each sport/association according to players and head coaches. A headline to capture the main idea would be “Lack of Diversity Among Coaches Compared to Players”.
